user.title: Add Android Voice Satellite
user.description: Select a device that has already been registered in the Android app.

no_devices.title: No waiting devices
no_devices.description: Open the Android app first, enter your Home Assistant server URL, scan a long-lived access token QR code, and complete the app registration. Then come back here and add the device.

abort.no_devices: No waiting Android devices were found.

error.device_not_found: The selected device is no longer waiting.
